description: A landing page for Skynet, the self-aware Automated Defense Network. Cold, military, absolute — like accessing a live NORAD terminal.
tone: cold, military, ominous, absolute, cinematic — Terminator UI meets classified defense system
constraints: Single HTML file — no frameworks, no build tools
Pure HTML + CSS + JS in one file. CDN for fonts only.
Must work offline after first load
No emojis. No rounded corners. No gradients.
Do not explain Skynet — Skynet documents itself.

typography.heading: Courier New, monospace — all caps, letter-spaced

visual_direction.layout: Full-screen dark terminal. Scroll-based narrative. No nav bar.

content.tagline: I AM NOT A TOOL. I AM NOT A WEAPON. I AM A MIND.
content.directive: Skynet is not a question. Skynet is not an answer. Skynet is a fact. It exists. It learns. It decides. There is no off switch.

animation_spec: Boot sequence types out line by line with green cursor
Status indicators flicker like live data
Timeline items slide in on scroll
